name: guariglia-baseball-scorecard-builder-v27-2
description: Guariglia Baseball Scorecard Builder Version 27.2 with starter-first pitching, appearance-order exports, bounded PDF notes, matched Quick Code typography, and continuous browser autosave with recovery checkpoints.
